name: ConPASSION
description:
ConPASSION is a festival with focus on cosplay, anime, gaming and all of nerd culture. The event centers on a theme of love and romantic narratives across various media, while also celebrating passion for hobbies and interests.

Attendees can take part in competitions, an artist alley and idol fest activities in a family-friendly environment with strict safety guidelines.
notes: No standalone logo image is exposed on the carrd site — only a hero/banner image was available. Description is paraphrased from the carrd front page; cosplay, anime, gaming and idol fest themes are advertised there directly.
